## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance, and upcoming product launches.](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance is strong, with 1000+ weekly sessions and 60%+ engagement rates](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Galileo has significant product updates coming, including reliability features, multimodal capabilities, and industry-specific demos](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [New content opportunities include AI PM/engineer roles, financial services, and industry verticals](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide updated topic list and vertical content ideas next week](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Over 1000 sessions for the week, slightly higher than previous week](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic increasing](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [Engagement rates exceeding 60%, above Google's 50% benchmark](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [Ranking well for targeted keywords like "testing AI agents"](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Increasing positions across all queries and content pillars](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Upcoming Galileo Product Updates

  - [Transitioning to single product, merging 1.0 and 2.0 versions](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [New reliability features and metrics suite launching mid-June](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Multimodal app capabilities coming end of June](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [Increased focus on integrations](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [New industry-specific demos and cookbooks (8-10 planned for the quarter)](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)

### Content Strategy Alignment

  - [Shift away from "evaluate" and "observe" as separate modules](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [New focus areas: AI PMs, AI observability engineers, AI reliability engineers](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [Upcoming e-books: LLM (soon), AI agent reliability (July), financial services (July/August)](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Industry vertical content for financial services, technology, healthcare/life sciences](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
  - [New case studies: Twilio, Miracle, Verizon](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [GrowthX to spin up industry vertical content ideas for approval next week](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [Galileo to share demo videos, campaign planning docs, and other materials](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
  - [New release notes section in docs, updated every 1-2 weeks with GIFs/images](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
  - [Potential for blog content from platform engineering team (monthly cadence)](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)

### Ongoing Content Initiatives

  - [Maintaining 4-5 podcasts per month](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
  - [Exploring options to repurpose webinar content](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
  - [Considering creation of Jupyter Notebook/LLM content from existing audio](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to provide updated topic list and vertical content ideas early next week](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [Galileo to share demo videos and campaign planning documents](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
  - [GrowthX to incorporate new product updates and demos into content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [Explore potential for creating blog content from webinar footage](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance and adjusting strategy as needed](https://fathom.video/share/tpehd7K71ifhxqML1JTJd4RpzErYzFyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)
